weapon_group.name: Sword
weapon_group.text: The target is made off-balance by your attack, becoming off-guard until the start of your next turn.

stat_block.text: The falcata is a heavy, one-handed sword with a single cutting edge, usually flaring to be wider towards the point of the weapon and narrower towards the hilt.

traits.name: Fatal
traits.text: The fatal trait includes a die size. On a critical hit, the weapon’s damage die increases to that die size instead of the normal die size, and the weapon adds one additional damage die of the listed size.
